FORM_ERRORS.USER_EXISTS: User with this email already exists
FORM_ERRORS.AT_LEAST_ONE_MACRONUTRIENT_MUST_BE_SET: At least one of the values for fats, proteins, or carbs must be greater than 0.
FORM_ERRORS.NON_EMPTY_ARRAY: At least one item must be added

PASSWORD.MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 6 characters

LOGIN.TITLE: Login
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Sign in to continue.
LOGIN.ACCOUNT_DELETED: This account is scheduled for deletion. Restore it to continue.

REGISTER.TITLE: Register
REGISTER.SUBTITLE: Create an account to keep your food diary in sync.
REGISTER.AGREE_TO_TERMS: I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
REGISTER.ACCOUNT_DELETED: This email belongs to a deleted account. Please restore it instead.

INFO.TITLE: Why create an account?
INFO.LEAD: Signing in keeps your food diary synchronized, secure, and insightful wherever you go.

HIGHLIGHTS.SYNC: Sync meals, body stats, and goals across all of your devices in real time.
HIGHLIGHTS.INSIGHTS: Unlock personalized analytics and see how your habits change week over week.
HIGHLIGHTS.LIBRARY: Store favorite products, recipes, and daily targets so logging stays effortless.

GOOGLE.UNAVAILABLE: Google sign-in is unavailable right now.

VERIFY.TITLE: Email verification
VERIFY.ERROR_GENERIC: We couldn't verify the email. Try again or request a new link.
VERIFY.ERROR_INVALID: Verification link is invalid or expired.

VERIFY_PENDING.TITLE: Check your email
VERIFY_PENDING.DESCRIPTION: We sent a confirmation link to {{ email }}. Open the email and click the link to verify your account.
VERIFY_PENDING.DESCRIPTION_FALLBACK: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it and click the link to verify your account.
VERIFY_PENDING.NOT_CONFIRMED: Still not confirmed. Please check your inbox or spam folder.
VERIFY_PENDING.ERROR: We couldn't load your profile. Please try again.
VERIFY_PENDING.RESEND_ERROR: Couldn't send the email. Please try again later.

RESET.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET.SUBTITLE: Create a new password to regain access to your account.
RESET.SENT: Password reset link sent. Check your inbox.
RESET.INVALID: The reset link is invalid or expired.
RESET.ERROR_GENERIC: We couldn't reset the password. Please try again.

NOT_FOUND.TITLE: 404 - Page Not Found
NOT_FOUND.DESCRIPTION: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.

ERRORS.LOAD_FAILED_MESSAGE: We couldn't load the data. Please try again.
ERRORS.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.

SEO.DEFAULT_DESCRIPTION: Food Diary is an online food diary, calorie and macro tracker, nutrition planner, weight and waist tracker, fasting tool, and dietologist workspace.
SEO.LANDING_TITLE: Food Diary, Calorie Counter, and Nutrition Planner
SEO.LANDING_DESCRIPTION: Keep an online food diary, track calories and macros, plan weekly meals, and review weight, waist, and progress in Food Diary.
SEO.FOOD_DIARY_PAGE: Online Food Diary for Meals, Calories, and Macros
SEO.FOOD_DIARY_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Keep a food diary in Food Diary: log meals, track calories and macros, plan nutrition, and review progress over time.
SEO.CALORIE_COUNTER_PAGE: Calorie Counter for Meals, Macros, and Goals
SEO.CALORIE_COUNTER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track calories and macros in Food Diary, log meals and recipes, compare daily intake with goals, and review weekly trends.
SEO.MEAL_PLANNER_PAGE: Weekly Meal Planner with Recipes and Shopping Lists
SEO.MEAL_PLANNER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Build weekly meal plans, reuse recipes, connect menus with shopping lists, and keep calorie and macro targets close.
SEO.MACRO_TRACKER_PAGE: Macro Tracker for Protein, Fat, and Carbs
SEO.MACRO_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track protein, fat, and carbs alongside calories, meals, recipes, goals, and progress in Food Diary.
SEO.INTERMITTENT_FASTING_PAGE: Intermittent Fasting App with Meal Tracking
SEO.INTERMITTENT_FASTING_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track intermittent fasting alongside meals, calories, hydration, weight, waist, and weekly trends in Food Diary.
SEO.MEAL_TRACKER_PAGE: Meal Tracker App for Daily Food History
SEO.MEAL_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Log breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks, reuse foods and recipes, and review meal history in Food Diary.
SEO.WEIGHT_LOSS_APP_PAGE: Weight Loss App for Food Tracking and Progress
SEO.WEIGHT_LOSS_APP_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Organize weight loss routines in Food Diary with meal logs, calorie goals, weight, waist, and trend review.
SEO.DIETOLOGIST_COLLABORATION_PAGE: Food Diary Sharing for Dietologist Collaboration
SEO.DIETOLOGIST_COLLABORATION_PAGE_DESCRIPTI: Invite a dietologist, share selected food diary data, and review goals, statistics, weight, and progress together.
SEO.NUTRITION_PLANNER_PAGE: Nutrition Planner for Goals and Weekly Review
SEO.NUTRITION_PLANNER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Plan nutrition around meals, calorie and macro goals, shopping lists, recipes, and weekly review in Food Diary.
SEO.WEIGHT_TRACKER_PAGE: Weight Tracker with Meals, Goals, and Trends
SEO.WEIGHT_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Record weight and review trends alongside meals, calories, goals, waist history, and weekly check-ins.
SEO.BODY_PROGRESS_TRACKER_PAGE: Body Progress Tracker for Weight and Waist
SEO.BODY_PROGRESS_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track weight, waist, and long-term body progress trends alongside nutrition, calories, goals, and weekly reviews.
SEO.SHOPPING_LIST_MEAL_PLANNER_PAGE: Meal Plan with Shopping List for Weekly Menus
SEO.SHOPPING_LIST_MEAL_PLANNER_PAGE_DESCRIPT: Connect meals, recipes, and foods in one plan so you can prepare a weekly shopping list in advance.
SEO.AUTH_DESCRIPTION: Sign in or create an account to start tracking your nutrition with Food Diary.
SEO.RESET_PASSWORD_DESCRIPTION: Reset your Food Diary account password.
SEO.DASHBOARD_DESCRIPTION: View your daily nutrition summary, trends, and key health insights.
SEO.PRODUCTS_DESCRIPTION: Browse and manage your food products database.
SEO.MEALS_DESCRIPTION: View and manage your daily meals and consumption history.
SEO.RECIPES_DESCRIPTION: Create and manage your favorite recipes with nutrition info.
SEO.SHOPPING_LISTS_DESCRIPTION: Plan your grocery shopping with smart lists.
SEO.GOALS_DESCRIPTION: Set and track your nutrition and health goals.
SEO.STATISTICS_DESCRIPTION: View detailed nutrition statistics and trends.
SEO.WEIGHT_HISTORY_DESCRIPTION: Track your weight changes over time.
SEO.WAIST_HISTORY_DESCRIPTION: Track your waist measurements over time.
SEO.CYCLE_TRACKING_DESCRIPTION: Track and predict your menstrual cycle.
SEO.FASTING_DESCRIPTION: Track your fasting sessions with customizable protocols.
SEO.GAMIFICATION_DESCRIPTION: Track your streaks, earn badges, and monitor your health score.
SEO.LESSONS_DESCRIPTION: Learn about nutrition science with bite-sized lessons.
SEO.MEAL_PLANS_DESCRIPTION: Browse and adopt curated meal plans by diet type.
SEO.WEEKLY_CHECK_IN_DESCRIPTION: Review your weekly nutrition progress and get personalized suggestions.
SEO.PREMIUM_DESCRIPTION: Unlock advanced features with Food Diary Premium.
SEO.PROFILE_DESCRIPTION: Manage your account settings and preferences.
SEO.PRIVACY_POLICY_DESCRIPTION: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.
SEO.EXPLORE_DESCRIPTION: Discover public recipes shared by the community.
SEO.NUTRITION_TRACKER_PAGE: Nutrition Tracker for Calories, Macros, and Progress
SEO.NUTRITION_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track nutrition in Food Diary with meals, calories, macros, goals, meal plans, and body progress in one app.
SEO.FOOD_LOG_PAGE: Food Log App for Daily Meal Tracking
SEO.FOOD_LOG_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Keep a food log in Food Diary: record what you eat, reuse common meals, and review history, calories, and macros.
SEO.PROTEIN_TRACKER_PAGE: Protein Tracker for Meals, Macros, and Goals
SEO.PROTEIN_TRACKER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Track protein in Food Diary alongside calories, fat, carbs, recipes, meals, and nutrition goals.
SEO.MEAL_PREP_PLANNER_PAGE: Meal Prep Planner for Weekly Menus and Shopping
SEO.MEAL_PREP_PLANNER_PAGE_DESCRIPTION: Plan meal prep in Food Diary with repeatable recipes, weekly menus, shopping lists, and nutrition goals in one workflow.

DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.TITLE: Nutrition summary
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.GOALS_BODY: Set goals to see progress rings and daily limits.
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.MACROS_BODY: Add protein, carbs, fats, and fiber targets to see macro progress bars.
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.CALORIES_BODY: Set your daily calorie target to see progress rings and weekly status.

RECIPE_LIST.TITLE: Recipes
RECIPE_LIST.SUBTITLE: Collection of your dishes and ideas

RECIPE_LIST.NO_RESULTS_COPY: Try a different search phrase or broaden your filters to see more recipes.
RECIPE_LIST.DELETE_ERROR: Unable to delete the recipe. Please try again.

RECIPE_DETAIL.WARNING_IN_USE: Recipe is used in meals and cannot be removed.
RECIPE_DETAIL.WARNING_NOT_OWNER: Only the author can edit or delete this recipe.

PRODUCT_DETAIL.WARNING_NOT_OWNER: You can only modify or delete products that you created.
